items.name: 円空作観音像
items.description: 員数：1体。寛文6年（1666年）に円空が道南各地を巡りながら作ったとされる観音像。

en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of a Kannon (Avalokitesvara) statue made by Enku. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Noboribetsu City, designated on 1993-09-02.

items.name: 円空作聖観音像
items.description: 員数：1体。円空の中期多作時代の観音像。

en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of a Sho-Kannon (Arya Avalokitesvara) statue made by Enku. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Noboribetsu City, designated on 1993-09-02.

items.name: 高村東雲作観音像
items.description: 員数：34体。三代目高村東雲が製作した観音像。

en.name_en: Kannon Statue Made by Takamura Toun
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of a Kannon (Avalokitesvara) statue made by Takamura Toun. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Noboribetsu City, designated on 1993-09-02.

items.name: 日野愛憙の「明治2年以降片倉家北海道移住顛末」
items.description: 員数：1点。片倉家家臣の日野愛憙が片倉家の入植した明治2年以降の出来事をまとめたもの。

en.name_romaji: Hino Aiki no "Meiji Ninen Ikō Katakurake Hokkaidō Ijū Tenmatsu"
en.name_en: Hino Aiki's "Account of the Katakura Family's Migration to Hokkaido from 1869 Onward"
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of Hino Aiki's account of the Katakura family's migration to Hokkaido from 1869 onward. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Noboribetsu City, designated on 1993-09-02.

items.name: 幌別鉱山獅子舞
items.description: 員数：ー。鉱山町で働く人々の安全と鉱山の増産を願った獅子舞。

en.description_en: This is a folk cultural property consisting of the lion dance (shishimai) of the Horobetsu mine. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Noboribetsu City, designated on 1993-09-02.

items.name: 黒澤家史料
items.description: 員数：33点。仙台藩白石城主片倉家の家臣で、主家とともに北海道に移住した黒澤家に代々伝わった武家文書。

en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of historical materials of the Kurosawa family. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Noboribetsu City, designated on 1998-02-10.

items.name: 登別化石林の炭化木（トドマツ）
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 員数：1点。約43,580年前のクッタラ火山の噴火堆積物により形成されたトドマツの炭化木。

en.name_en: Carbonized Wood of the Noboribetsu Fossil Forest (Sakhalin Fir)
en.description_en: This is a monument (historic site, scenic beauty, natural monument) consisting of carbonized wood (Sakhalin fir) from the Noboribetsu fossil forest. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Noboribetsu City, designated on 2017-02-01.

items.name: 幌別村役場文書
items.description: 員数：96点。旧幌別村から登別市に引き継がれた、明治5年から昭和20年代までの公文書。

en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of documents of the Horobetsu village office. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Noboribetsu City, designated on 2019-04-26.

items.name: 片倉家主従開拓記念碑
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 員数：1基。大正15年（1926）に仙台藩の片倉家主従の子孫等によって建てられた石碑。

en.name_en: Katakura Family and Retainers Pioneer Commemoration Monument
en.description_en: This is a monument (historic site) consisting of a pioneer commemoration monument for the Katakura family and their retainers. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Noboribetsu City, designated on 2022-03-30.

items.name: 丈草の記
items.description: 員数：1点。明治15年（1882）に現香川県丸亀市から現登別市へ移住した宮武藤之助による回想録。

en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the Record of Joso. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Noboribetsu City, designated on 2023-02-24.

items.name: 石川脩次コレクション
items.description: 員数：223点。石川脩次が登別温泉を訪れたさまざまな分野の著名人からもらった揮毫のコレクション。

en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the collection of Ishikawa Shuji. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Noboribetsu City, designated on 2025-06-04.
